name: Public Sector & Government (DACH)
description: Federal, state and municipal government agencies in Germany, Austria and Switzerland requiring digitalization of public services, sovereign cloud infrastructure, and GDPR/BSI-compliant IT modernization.

segmentation.buyer_profile: CIO offices, IT departments, central procurement agencies (e.g. ITZBund, BWI, Dataport)
drivers: KRITIS regulation and BSI C5 compliance

sizing.methodology: LLM estimation based on public-sector IT spend reports and market knowledge

tam.description: Total public-sector IT spending in DACH (~EUR 18B annually, including hardware, software, services)

sam.description: Cloud infrastructure and managed services portion of public-sector IT in DACH, addressable by T-Systems' portfolio

som.description: Realistically capturable share given T-Systems' incumbent position in German federal/state IT and sovereign cloud advantage

competitive_landscape: BWI (Bundeswehr), Ionos/Delos Cloud, SAP SE (Sovereign Cloud), AWS GovCloud, local IT service providers (Bechtle, Computacenter)
